channel.title: Weekend UX
channel.description: Weekend UX - Premium Design and Development Learning Platform

item.title: Weekend UX - Home
item.description: Premium design and development learning platform. Upskill with industry-relevant training programs.

item.title: About Us - Weekend UX
item.description: Learn more about Weekend UX, our mission, vision, and the team empowering next-generation design leaders.

item.title: Courses - Weekend UX
item.description: Explore our comprehensive list of UI/UX design, frontend, and backend development courses.

item.title: Contact Us - Weekend UX
item.description: Get in touch with us for course inquiries, support, or partnership opportunities.

item.title: Our Locations - Weekend UX
item.description: Find Weekend UX physical centers, campuses, and virtual training hubs.

item.title: Privacy Policy - Weekend UX
item.description: Read our privacy policy regarding how we collect, store, and manage user data securely.

item.title: Disclaimer - Weekend UX
item.description: Legal disclaimer and terms of usage for the Weekend UX platform.
